2606.18101.title: Trust the Right Teacher: Quality-Aware Self-Distillation for GUI Grounding
2606.18101.paper_summary: Graphical user interface (GUI) grounding requires vision-language models (VLMs) to identify small target elements in high-resolution screenshots and predict precise screen coordinates. On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) is a promising post-training approach for this coordinate-sensitive task, since it provides dense token-level teacher signals beyond hard coordinate labels. However, naive OPSD is not well suited to GUI grounding: OPSD evaluates the teacher on student-generated prefixes, the quality of coordinate-token teacher signals can degrade when the prefix has already deviated from the target coordinate, leading to unreliable teacher signal. To mitigate this, We propose quality-aware self-distillation for VLM-based GUI grounding, which improves coordinate-token teacher-signal quality through soft correctness-aware gating and teacher-probability scaling. The soft correctness-aware gate checks whether the teacher's current coordinate-token prediction can still be completed into the ground-truth box under the student-generated prefix. If not, the corresponding teacher signal is down-weighted. Teacher-probability scaling then uses the teacher's confidence as a lightweight factor to further calibrate the strength of the gated supervision. A key empirical finding is that neither component alone improves overall performance, whereas combining them consistently improves performance. This suggests that the two mechanisms play complementary roles: correctness-aware gating suppresses unreliable coordinate-token supervision, while teacher-probability scaling calibrates the strength of the remaining signals. Experiments across six GUI grounding benchmarks show that our method consistently improves the base model and outperforms strong baselines.
2606.18101.paper_summary_zh: 圖形用戶界面（GUI）基礎需要視覺-語言模型（VLMs）在高解析度截圖中識別小目標元素並預測精確的螢幕坐標。政策內自蒸餾（OPSD）是一種有前景的後訓練方法，適用於這一對坐標敏感的任務，因為它提供了超越硬坐標標籤的密集標記級教師信號。然而，天真的 OPSD 並不適合 GUI 基礎：OPSD 在學生生成的前綴上評估教師，當前綴已經偏離目標坐標時，坐標標記教師信號的質量可能會下降，導致不可靠的教師信號。為了減輕這一問題，我們提出了基於 VLM 的 GUI 基礎的質量感知自蒸餾，通過軟正確性感知閘和教師概率縮放來提高坐標標記教師信號的質量。軟正確性感知閘檢查教師當前的坐標標記預測是否仍然可以在學生生成的前綴下完成到真實框。如果不能，則相應的教師信號會被降低權重。然後，教師概率縮放使用教師的信心作為輕量級因子進一步校準閘控監督的強度。一個關鍵的實證發現是，單獨的任何一個組件都不會改善整體性能，而將它們結合起來則持續改善性能。這表明這兩個機制扮演著互補的角色：正確性感知閘抑制了不可靠的坐標標記監督，而教師概率縮放校準了剩餘信號的強度。在六個 GUI 基礎基準上的實驗顯示，我們的方法持續改善了基礎模型並超越了強基線。
2606.18101.author: Jingyuan Huang et.al.
2606.18101.authors: Jingyuan Huang, Zuming Huang, Yucheng Shi, Tianze Yang, Xiaoming Zhai, Wei Chu, Ninghao Liu
